#Synthetic fixture for tests/backend/test_validate_sex_thresholds.py — XY case.
#NEVER copied from a real export; every genotype is hand-fabricated to exercise
#Plan §9.4 candidate-XY path: 0 het + >=1 hom on non-PAR chrX, chrY non-no-call
#rate above the default 0.30 XY-confirm threshold.
# AncestryDNA array version: V2.0
